narrative: Trump warnings of military retaliation against Iran drive a geopolitical risk premium, lifting crude toward $86.2 and supporting the dollar as equities consolidate. USD/JPY holds near four-decade highs at 163.10, where the +275bp Fed-BoJ OIS carry advantage sustains the bid despite verbal intervention risks. Gold firmed +2.18% near $4,165 on risk-premium demand, while equities +0.13%, DXY -0.06%, and VIX 16.9 reflect a mixed risk regime. Watch the ECB rate decision tomorrow at 12:15 UTC.
